narrative: Senior Applied Scientist at Meta with 16 years of AI/ML experience, bringing deep product‑focused expertise from a leading tech firm. The standout factor is the exceptionally strong match to the Search & Retrieval role, with a JD‑relevant skill score far above the pool average, confirming that his work with LlamaIndex, Qdrant, OpenSearch and advanced NLP pipelines aligns directly with the job’s core requirements. His background in deep learning and large‑scale retrieval systems dovetails with the senior‑level expectations, while his current location in Indore means relocation to Pune or Noida would be needed. A minor caveat is the limited visibility into his notice period and a small trust flag on his profile.
